prompt: A 90 mm tall short bench-test threaded storage auger for a powder doser, with no external gear. All dimensions in millimetres. The part is a vertical hollow tube with a 25 mm outer diameter (12.5 mm outer radius) and a 21 mm inner bore diameter (10.5 mm bore radius, 2 mm wall). The bottom 12 mm is a closed funnel cone: the bore tapers from the 10.5 mm bore radius down to a 1.5 mm radius, ending in a 3 mm diameter exit hole through the very bottom face. Inside the bottom third of the tube there is a single-flight Archimedean screw on a central 8 mm diameter shaft. The shaft tapers from 0.8 mm diameter at the exit up to 8 mm diameter over the bottom 12 mm, then stays 8 mm. A 2 mm thick helical fin with a 10 mm pitch winds around the shaft, with an outer fin radius of 10.5 mm so it nearly touches the bore wall. The screw and fin occupy only the bottom one third of the tube height; the top two thirds of the bore is left completely open as a loose-powder storage volume. The top 25.4 mm (about one inch) of the outer wall carries a single-start right-hand external screw thread with a 4 mm pitch; the thread crest is flush with the 25 mm outer diameter (it never exceeds the 25 mm outer diameter so brackets can still slide over it) and the thread root is at 23 mm diameter. The filling (top) end is a smooth open cylinder with no top cap.
code:
/*
Generated by Text-to-CAD:
A 90 mm tall short bench-test threaded storage auger for a powder doser, with no external gear. All dimensions in millimetres. The part is a vertical hollow tube with a 25 mm outer diameter (12.5 mm outer radius) and a 21 mm inner bore diameter (10.5 mm bore radius, 2 mm wall). The bottom 12 mm is a closed funnel cone: the bore tapers from the 10.5 mm bore radius down to a 1.5 mm radius, ending in a 3 mm diameter exit hole through the very bottom face. Inside the bottom third of the tube there is a single-flight Archimedean screw on a central 8 mm diameter shaft. The shaft tapers from 0.8 mm diameter at the exit up to 8 mm diameter over the bottom 12 mm, then stays 8 mm. A 2 mm thick helical fin with a 10 mm pitch winds around the shaft, with an outer fin radius of 10.5 mm so it nearly touches the bore wall. The screw and fin occupy only the bottom one third of the tube height; the top two thirds of the bore is left completely open as a loose-powder storage volume. The top 25.4 mm (about one inch) of the outer wall carries a single-start right-hand external screw thread with a 4 mm pitch; the thread crest is flush with the 25 mm outer diameter (it never exceeds the 25 mm outer diameter so brackets can still slide over it) and the thread root is at 23 mm diameter. The filling (top) end is a smooth open cylinder with no top cap. 
*/
@settings(defaultLengthUnit = mm)

height = 90mm
outerDiameter = 25mm
outerRadius = outerDiameter / 2
boreDiameter = 21mm
boreRadius = boreDiameter / 2
wallThickness = 2mm
funnelHeight = 12mm
exitDiameter = 3mm
exitRadius = exitDiameter / 2
screwHeight = height / 3
shaftTopDiameter = 8mm
shaftTopRadius = shaftTopDiameter / 2
shaftExitDiameter = 0.8mm
shaftExitRadius = shaftExitDiameter / 2
finThickness = 2mm
finPitch = 10mm
finOuterRadius = boreRadius
finInnerOverlapRadius = shaftExitRadius - 0.05mm
finMidRadius = (finOuterRadius + finInnerOverlapRadius) / 2
finCenterLength = screwHeight - finThickness
finRevolutions = finCenterLength / finPitch
threadLength = 25.4mm
threadPitch = 4mm
threadCrestRadius = outerRadius
threadRootRadius = 23mm / 2
threadDepth = threadCrestRadius - threadRootRadius
threadProfileWidth = threadPitch * 0.52
threadStartZ = height - threadLength
threadCenterLength = threadLength - threadProfileWidth
threadRevolutions = threadCenterLength / threadPitch
csgOverlap = 0.08mm
finHelixAxis = {
  origin = [0mm, 0mm, finThickness / 2],
  direction = [0, 0, 1.0]
}

housingProfile = sketch(on = XZ) {
  bottomFace = line(start = [var 1.5mm, var 0mm], end = [var 12.5mm, var 0mm])
  lowerOuterWall = line(start = [var 12.5mm, var 0mm], end = [var 12.5mm, var 64.6mm])
  threadShoulder = line(start = [var 12.5mm, var 64.6mm], end = [var 11.5mm, var 64.6mm])
  threadRootWall = line(start = [var 11.5mm, var 64.6mm], end = [var 11.5mm, var 90mm])
  topLip = line(start = [var 11.5mm, var 90mm], end = [var 10.5mm, var 90mm])
  upperBoreWall = line(start = [var 10.5mm, var 90mm], end = [var 10.5mm, var 12mm])
  funnelBoreWall = line(start = [var 10.5mm, var 12mm], end = [var 1.5mm, var 0mm])

  coincident([bottomFace.end, lowerOuterWall.start])
  coincident([
    lowerOuterWall.end,
    threadShoulder.start
  ])
  coincident([
    threadShoulder.end,
    threadRootWall.start
  ])
  coincident([threadRootWall.end, topLip.start])
  coincident([topLip.end, upperBoreWall.start])
  coincident([
    upperBoreWall.end,
    funnelBoreWall.start
  ])
  coincident([funnelBoreWall.end, bottomFace.start])

  horizontal(bottomFace)
  vertical(lowerOuterWall)
  horizontal(threadShoulder)
  vertical(threadRootWall)
  horizontal(topLip)
  vertical(upperBoreWall)

  horizontalDistance([ORIGIN, bottomFace.start]) == exitRadius
  verticalDistance([ORIGIN, bottomFace.start]) == 0mm
  horizontalDistance([bottomFace.start, bottomFace.end]) == outerRadius - exitRadius
  verticalDistance([
  lowerOuterWall.start,
  lowerOuterWall.end
]) == threadStartZ
  horizontalDistance([
  threadShoulder.end,
  threadShoulder.start
]) == threadDepth
  verticalDistance([
  threadRootWall.start,
  threadRootWall.end
]) == threadLength
  horizontalDistance([topLip.end, topLip.start]) == threadRootRadius - boreRadius
  verticalDistance([upperBoreWall.end, upperBoreWall.start]) == height - funnelHeight
  horizontalDistance([
  funnelBoreWall.end,
  funnelBoreWall.start
]) == boreRadius - exitRadius
  verticalDistance([
  funnelBoreWall.end,
  funnelBoreWall.start
]) == funnelHeight
}
housingRegion = region(point = [11mm, 80mm], sketch = housingProfile)
housingShell = revolve(housingRegion, axis = Y)
hide(housingProfile)

externalThreadProfile = sketch(on = XZ) {
  lowerThreadFlank = line(start = [var 11.42mm, var -1.04mm], end = [var 12.5mm, var 0mm])
  upperThreadFlank = line(start = [var 12.5mm, var 0mm], end = [var 11.42mm, var 1.04mm])
  threadRootSide = line(start = [var 11.42mm, var 1.04mm], end = [var 11.42mm, var -1.04mm])

  coincident([
    lowerThreadFlank.end,
    upperThreadFlank.start
  ])
  coincident([
    upperThreadFlank.end,
    threadRootSide.start
  ])
  coincident([
    threadRootSide.end,
    lowerThreadFlank.start
  ])

  vertical(threadRootSide)
  horizontalDistance([ORIGIN, threadRootSide.start]) == threadRootRadius - csgOverlap
  verticalDistance([
  threadRootSide.end,
  threadRootSide.start
]) == threadProfileWidth
  horizontalDistance([
  threadRootSide.start,
  lowerThreadFlank.end
]) == threadDepth + csgOverlap
  verticalDistance([
  lowerThreadFlank.end,
  threadRootSide.start
]) == threadProfileWidth / 2
  verticalDistance([ORIGIN, lowerThreadFlank.end]) == 0mm
  equalLength([lowerThreadFlank, upperThreadFlank])
}
externalThreadRegion = region(point = [12mm, 0mm], sketch = externalThreadProfile)
externalThreadHelix = helix(
  revolutions = threadRevolutions,
  angleStart = 0deg,
  ccw = true,
  radius = threadCrestRadius,
  axis = Z,
  length = threadCenterLength,
)
externalThread = sweep(externalThreadRegion, path = externalThreadHelix)
  |> translate(z = threadStartZ + threadProfileWidth / 2, global = true)
hide(externalThreadProfile)
hide(externalThreadHelix)

housingBody = union([housingShell, externalThread], tolerance = 0.001mm)
  |> appearance(
       color = "#b9c8d8",
       metalness = 25,
       roughness = 55,
       opacity = 58,
     )

shaftProfile = sketch(on = XZ) {
  shaftTipFace = line(start = [var 0mm, var 0mm], end = [var 0.4mm, var 0mm])
  shaftTaper = line(start = [var 0.4mm, var 0mm], end = [var 4mm, var 12mm])
  shaftUpperWall = line(start = [var 4mm, var 12mm], end = [var 4mm, var 30mm])
  shaftTopFace = line(start = [var 4mm, var 30mm], end = [var 0mm, var 30mm])
  shaftAxis = line(start = [var 0mm, var 30mm], end = [var 0mm, var 0mm])

  coincident([shaftTipFace.end, shaftTaper.start])
  coincident([shaftTaper.end, shaftUpperWall.start])
  coincident([shaftUpperWall.end, shaftTopFace.start])
  coincident([shaftTopFace.end, shaftAxis.start])
  coincident([shaftAxis.end, shaftTipFace.start])

  horizontal(shaftTipFace)
  vertical(shaftUpperWall)
  horizontal(shaftTopFace)
  vertical(shaftAxis)

  coincident([shaftTipFace.start, ORIGIN])
  horizontalDistance([shaftTipFace.start, shaftTipFace.end]) == shaftExitRadius
  verticalDistance([shaftTaper.start, shaftTaper.end]) == funnelHeight
  horizontalDistance([shaftTaper.start, shaftTaper.end]) == shaftTopRadius - shaftExitRadius
  verticalDistance([
  shaftUpperWall.start,
  shaftUpperWall.end
]) == screwHeight - funnelHeight
  horizontalDistance([shaftTopFace.end, shaftTopFace.start]) == shaftTopRadius
}
shaftRegion = region(point = [2mm, 20mm], sketch = shaftProfile)
shaftBody = revolve(shaftRegion, axis = Y)
hide(shaftProfile)

finProfile = sketch(on = XZ) {
  finLowerFace = line(start = [var 0.35mm, var 0mm], end = [var 10.5mm, var 0mm])
  finOuterFace = line(start = [var 10.5mm, var 0mm], end = [var 10.5mm, var 2mm])
  finUpperFace = line(start = [var 10.5mm, var 2mm], end = [var 0.35mm, var 2mm])
  finInnerFace = line(start = [var 0.35mm, var 2mm], end = [var 0.35mm, var 0mm])

  coincident([finLowerFace.end, finOuterFace.start])
  coincident([finOuterFace.end, finUpperFace.start])
  coincident([finUpperFace.end, finInnerFace.start])
  coincident([finInnerFace.end, finLowerFace.start])

  horizontal(finLowerFace)
  vertical(finOuterFace)
  horizontal(finUpperFace)
  vertical(finInnerFace)

  horizontalDistance([ORIGIN, finLowerFace.start]) == finInnerOverlapRadius
  verticalDistance([ORIGIN, finLowerFace.start]) == 0mm
  horizontalDistance([finLowerFace.start, finLowerFace.end]) == finOuterRadius - finInnerOverlapRadius
  verticalDistance([finOuterFace.start, finOuterFace.end]) == finThickness
}
finRegion = region(point = [5mm, 1mm], sketch = finProfile)
finHelix = helix(
  revolutions = finRevolutions,
  angleStart = 0deg,
  ccw = true,
  radius = finMidRadius,
  axis = finHelixAxis,
  length = finCenterLength,
)
finBody = sweep(finRegion, path = finHelix)
hide(finProfile)
hide(finHelix)

augerShaftBody = appearance(
  shaftBody,
  color = "#d88a24",
  metalness = 10,
  roughness = 45,
)
augerFinBody = appearance(
  finBody,
  color = "#d88a24",
  metalness = 10,
  roughness = 45,
)
